summary: Iteration 6 - CryptoCompare Integration Testing. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. CryptoCompare successfully replaced CoinGecko for crypto data. 25 crypto prices with images, real-time updates, chart endpoints all working.

backend: GET /api/market/live returns 25 crypto prices from CryptoCompare
Crypto data has price, change_24h, market_cap, volume, image fields
Crypto prices have micro-movements between polls
Forex prices STABLE when market closed (Sunday)
Indian prices STABLE when market closed (Sunday)
Crypto coins in losers (FIL -8.72%, APT -7.19%, etc.)
frontend: Login with test@signalbeast.com / Test1234! works
Dashboard shows LIVE indicator with tick counter
Dashboard shows Market Hours bar: 'Crypto 24/7 • Forex Closed • NSE Closed'
Dashboard ticker tape shows crypto prices with CryptoCompare images
Dashboard BTC 7D chart displays correctly ($68,816.99)
Dashboard Top Gainers shows Indian stocks (JSWSTEEL +3.42%, etc.)
Dashboard Top Losers shows crypto (FIL -8.72%, APT -7.19%, etc.)
Dashboard Forex panel shows CLOSED badge
Dashboard Tracked Assets: 81 (25C / 12F / 44I)
Markets page Crypto tab shows 25 coins with CryptoCompare images
Markets page Forex tab shows CLOSED badge and amber banner
Markets page Indian tab shows CLOSED badge and amber banner
Chart page /chart/crypto/bitcoin loads with TradingView chart
Chart page shows live price ($68,973.88) updating in real-time
Chart page period buttons (1D, 7D, 1M, 3M, 1Y) work
Chart page shows 24H High, Low, Volume, Market Cap stats
Signals page shows existing signals with live prices
Alerts page shows 5 active alerts with current prices
Strategy page accessible with Quick Templates
Beast AI Chat works - responds to 'What is Bitcoin?'

market_hours_verified.crypto: 24/7 - always open, prices tick every second

context_for_next_testing_agent: CryptoCompare integration is complete and working. 25 crypto prices load from CryptoCompare every 30 seconds. Images are from cryptocompare.com/media/. Chart endpoints use CryptoCompare v2/histohour and v2/histoday. No API key required. Market hours awareness working: forex/indian CLOSED on Sunday with stable prices, crypto 24/7 with micro-movements.
